commands: vp env install --node 22 ./command-env-install-node-version-pkg # Install with Node.js 22

cat $VITE_PLUS_HOME/bins/command-env-install-node-version-pkg-cli.json | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); console.log('Node major:', d.nodeVersion.split('.')[0])" # Verify Node 22
vp env install --node 20 ./command-env-install-node-version-pkg # Install with Node.js 20

cat $VITE_PLUS_HOME/bins/command-env-install-node-version-pkg-cli.json | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); console.log('Node major:', d.nodeVersion.split('.')[0])" # Verify Node 20
